---
name: Test request
about: Propose a new scenario, suite, or coverage improvement
title: 'Test: '
labels: test
assignees: ''
---

## Scenario

Describe the behavior or risk that needs coverage.

## Suggested Suite

- [ ] Smoke
- [ ] Regression
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] API/network
- [ ] Visual
- [ ] Accessibility

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test covers one clear behavior.
- [ ] Test uses page objects, fixtures, and centralized selectors.
- [ ] Test has the correct tags and can run with the documented npm command.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if the behavior or suite boundary changes.

## Test Data

List users, products, checkout data, or network fixtures required.

## Notes

Add links, screenshots, or examples that clarify the request.
